description: Multi-party merger agreement with defined terms, signature blocks, and exhibits. Representative of SEC EDGAR Form 8-K Exhibit 2.1 filings.
source: SEC EDGAR — obtain any publicly-filed merger agreement (Form 8-K, Exhibit 2.1). Search: https://efts.sec.gov/LATEST/search-index?q=%22merger+agreement%22&forms=8-K&dateRange=custom&startdt=2024-01-01&enddt=2025-01-01

metadata.note: Update pageCount to match your obtained PDF before running benchmark.

readingOrderChecks.description: Numbered article headings appear in document

legalArtifacts.manualEvalNote: Verify: (1) confidentiality stamp preserved as text or clearly suppressed, (2) signature block appears at end with party names, (3) Exhibit A/B references intact inline.

clauseContinuity.manualEvalNote: Count defined-term clauses that start on one page and end on next. Score 5 = all 3 joined, score 3 = 1–2 broken.
